title: AnalyzerSpec
description: Schema for analyzer metadata configuration. Defines the analyzer tool, its capabilities, supported languages, and tool contract.

name.description: Unique lowercase identifier for the analyzer (e.g., 'cbm'). Used in file paths and references.

display_name.description: Human-readable display name for the analyzer (e.g., 'CodePrism')

description.description: Optional detailed description of what this analyzer does

mcp_server_name.description: MCP server identifier for this analyzer. Used to locate and invoke the analyzer service.

homepage.description: Optional URL to the analyzer's homepage or documentation

binary_names.description: Optional list of executable or binary names associated with this analyzer

oneOf.description: Minimum version of the analyzer tool that is supported
null indicates the minimum version is unknown or not specified

notes.description: Optional implementation notes or additional context about this analyzer

supported_tool_contract.description: Specifies the MCP tools, contract version, and supported I/O types for this analyzer

tools.description: MCP tools and their availability status

required.description: Required MCP tools that must be available

optional.description: Optional MCP tools that may be available

input_type.description: Expected input type for this analyzer

output_type.description: Output format produced by this analyzer

supported_languages.description: List of programming languages supported by this analyzer

project_identification.description: Specifies how this analyzer identifies and validates the project being analyzed

strategy.description: Strategy used to identify the project. 'absolute_path' uses findProjectRoot() to determine stable project identity.

description.description: Detailed explanation of how the DR CLI passes the project root and how the analyzer uses it for identification

metadata.description: Metadata about the analyzer including version, author, etc.

author.description: Author or organization maintaining this analyzer

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this analyzer configuration was created

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last update
